scope: Governed institutional pilot evidence and closure workflow
controls: Immutable versioned manual-process baseline and success criteria
Pseudonymous append-only admin and learner observations
Role-snapshotted append-only stakeholder and assessor attestations
Audit-pack and revoked-credential references constrained to the pilot Space
Closure requires completed participation, version reconciliation and real evidence rows
Closure requires a selected active identity-provider connection and test attestation
Accessibility accepts transparent remediation actions; other release gates require acceptance
scopeLimit: This proves the workflow and refusal behavior with simulated test actors. It does not prove a real design partner, independent assessment, active production identity provider or stakeholder acceptance. Those tracker gates remain open.
